rule_metadata.author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious JavaScript Execution Via Mshta.EXE

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious JavaScript Execution Via Mshta.EXE
id: 67f113fa-e23d-4271-befa-30113b3e08b1
status: test
description: Detects execution of javascript code using "mshta.exe".
references:
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/6bc283c4-21f2-4aed-a05c-a9a3ffa95dd4.html
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218.005/T1218.005.md
author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
date: 2019-10-24
modified: 2023-02-07
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1218.005
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith: \mshta.exe
  - OriginalFileName: MSHTA.EXE
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains: javascript
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
